name: Telnyx Agent Skills
description: Official Agent Skills for building on Telnyx — structured, up-to-date context for AI agents to generate correct, production-ready code using Telnyx APIs and SDKs.

skills.name: benchmark-compare
skills.description: Run portable benchmarks comparing Telnyx vs competitors

skills.name: branded-calling
skills.description: Configure branded calling with call attestation

skills.name: call-control
skills.description: Programmatic call control with WebRTC bridging

skills.name: edge-inference
skills.description: Deploy AI inference at carrier edge with co-located STT/TTS

skills.name: migrate-from-twilio
skills.description: Complete migration guide with code examples, CLI tool, and API mapping

skills.name: number-verification
skills.description: Verify phone numbers and detect SIM swap with STIR/SHAKEN

skills.name: push-notification-tester
skills.description: Test VoIP push notifications for Telnyx WebRTC iOS (APNs) and Android (FCM) apps. Use when debugging push notification delivery, validating certificate/credential setup, or testing that a device receives VoIP pushes correctly.

skills.name: sip-trunking
skills.description: Configure and deploy SIP trunks on carrier-owned infrastructure

skills.name: sms-api
skills.description: Send and receive SMS programmatically with delivery receipts

skills.name: stt-tts
skills.description: Configure speech-to-text and text-to-speech with sub-200ms latency

skills.name: telnyx-ai-outbound-voice-python
skills.description: End-to-end setup for making a Telnyx AI assistant call a phone number. Covers provisioning a phone number, creating a TeXML application, assigning the number, configuring telephony settings, whitelisting destination countries, and triggering outbound calls via scheduled events. Use this skill (not telnyx-ai-assistants-python) when the task involves an AI assistant placing, making, or triggering an outbound phone call to a user.

skills.name: telnyx-cli
skills.description: Use the Telnyx CLI to manage phone numbers, send messages, make calls, and access all Telnyx APIs from the terminal. 946 commands auto-generated from the OpenAPI spec — every API endpoint is a CLI command.

skills.name: telnyx-external-coding-agents
skills.description: Curated Telnyx skill-pack for external coding agents building voice AI, messaging, and onboarding flows. Packages discovery, auth, focused MCP apps, and the right product guides so agents stay on a bounded, low-hallucination path.

skills.name: telnyx-twilio-migration
skills.description: Migrate from Twilio to Telnyx. Orchestrates a complete 6-phase migration: discovery, planning, setup, code migration, validation, and cleanup. Covers voice (TwiML to TeXML, Call Control API), messaging, WebRTC, SIP trunking, verify, fax, video, IoT, number lookup, and porting. Includes automated scanners, validation scripts, and integration tests.
